provisions.title: ADDITION OF THE PENSION LIST
provisions.content:
MILITARY GOVERNMENT OF SANTO IDOMINGO-
                Executive Order No. 803.
               ADDITION O F THE PENSION LIST.
                             ---
    By virtue of t h e powers v-esteld in t h e Military Government
of Santo Domino, the following Executive Order is hereby pro-
mulgated :
       ARTICLE 1. In view of the certificate issued by t h e Secre-
t a r y of Interior and Police in accordance with t h e provisions
of Article 7 of Executive Order No. 456, t h e following adidlition
is hereby made t o t h e Pension List provided by Executive Onder
No. 695:
          Lic. Paulino A. Castillo, Santo Domingo City.
          14888     -      $37.50 per month.
       This 'pension shall be effective beginning Jun'e 19, 1922, anid
t h e amount of saild pension is subject to t h e reduction established
by Executive Order No. 744, dated May 18, 1922.

                                   S . S. ROBISON,
                          Rear Admirral, United States Navy,
                         Miilitary Governor of Santo Domingo.

  Santo Domingo, R. D.,
September 22, 1922.

     MILITARY GOVERNMENT OF SANTO IDOMINGO.
                     Executive Ordler No. 804.
                 APPROPRIATION O F FUNDS.

    By virtue of t h e powers vested in the Military Government
of Santo Domingo, t h e following Executive Order is hereby pro-
mulgated :
    ARTICLE 1. There is hereby appropriated from any funlds
